nasb.text: But Peter said, “By no means, Lord, for I have never eaten anything unholy and unclean.”

esv.text: But Peter said, “By no means, Lord; for I have never eaten anything that is common or unclean.”

cnv.text: 彼得說：“主啊，千萬不可！我從來不吃俗物和不潔的東西。”

ccb.text: 彼得却说：“主啊！这可不行！我从未吃过任何污秽不洁之物。”

csbs.text: 彼得却说：“主啊，千万不可！因为我从来没有吃过任何俗物和不洁净的东西。”
